payload.validation_plan: 2-page rule + sources cited

payload.summary: Apollo: ops portal v2 IA + build

payload.notes: 6 pages rendered, all return 200, tag-balance clean

edited report.py to write reports.html instead of index.html
added frontend-engineer + it-researcher to ENGINEERS allowlist

evidence.note: chrome (HTML+CSS+JS) per page ~5kB, far under 50kB. changes.html exceeds 50kB but only because of the 119-event data payload; chrome alone is identical to other pages. CSS=3179B inlined per page, JS=0.

payload.reason: investigate UDM crash root cause
payload.summary: UDM Pro Max crash root-cause research

payload.reason: support Athena's UDM crash research with current state snapshot

payload.constraints: read-only; >=2s gap between API calls; abort on first timeout or non-200
probes: kubectl get deploy/hr for external-dns-unifi, unifi-exporter, unpoller

payload.note: low-risk read-only; all probes returned 200 first try; doc drafted

key_findings: integration API cold-start 4.86s vs OS HTTP 30ms suggests Network module slow to spin
all pollers confirmed quiet, HA integration disabled

payload.validation_plan: doc renders, all source URLs resolve, fits two-page rule

payload.evidence: doc length under two pages, six primary sources cited with dates, three ranked hypotheses with evidence-strength column

payload.reason: Re-research UDM crash root cause on actual controller version 10.3.58 (prior doc targeted wrong 10.2.x branch)
payload.summary: Produce udm-crash-rootcause-10.3.x.md: 10.3.x changelog audit + community/GitHub evidence + fix-version determination

payload.plan: Collect 10.3.x release notes (RSS + community pages + goofball222 mirror), query unpoller and kashalls/external-dns-unifi-webhook GitHub for issues since Feb 2026, evaluate dnsmasq angle on 10.3.x, decide fix-version posture

payload.primary_finding: 10.3.58 is latest 10.3.x; no fix-version exists; unpoller #1013 reproduces our symptom on 10.3.58

payload.primary_sources: UI RSS, goofball222 CHANGELOG, unpoller #1013/#1014, kashalls issues list, Releasebot

payload.qa: superseding relationship to chg-2026-05-13-019 named in TL;DR; ranked hypotheses table flags deltas vs previous doc; fix-version posture answers the sharpened question explicitly

payload.key_decision: no fix-version on horizon; poller scope reduction now mandatory not optional

payload.reason: User confirmed root cause: HomeWizard plug VDHNGFW flapping. Restoring all UniFi pollers; unpoller-specific investigation tracked separately.

payload.rollback: git revert the revert; re-apply suspends
payload.validation_plan: All 3 deployments reach 1/1; HA UniFi integration loaded; unpoller does not crash-loop within 30 min

payload.unpoller: running 1/1 BUT auth fails (403 from /api/auth/login with creds in unpoller-secret, last rotated 2026-04-08)

payload.reason: Replaces inc-2026-05-13-004. unpoller v2.39 incompatible with UniFi 10.x (Athena memory:unifi-v10-poller-breakage); unifi-exporter covers usable scope; deleting credentials reduces attack surface.

payload.validation_plan: unpoller pod gone, ServiceMonitor gone, secret gone, no Prometheus scrape errors, unifi-exporter unaffected

external_actions: Flux pruned: Deployment, HelmRelease, ServiceMonitor, secret, Service, SA

payload.evidence: all unpoller resources NotFound; unifi-exporter still running 1/1; no Prometheus scrape failures expected
